This is the foundation file that all agents and skills will build upon.

new_value: Created .github/agents/beads-pm.agent.md encoding the planning loop: orient (specs + bd prime + existing issues), gap analysis, task graph creation with priorities and deps, cycle validation, and reporting. Maps PROMPT_plan.md behavior to VS Code Copilot agent mode.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-ud3","title":"Create beads-dev agent definition (.github/agents/beads-dev.agent.md)","description":"Create the beads-dev agent that encodes the ralph-beads build loop: bd ready -\u003e claim -\u003e implement -\u003e validate -\u003e commit -\u003e close. Agent should follow AGENTS.md patterns, enforce one-task-per-iteration, run backpressure checks, and discover/link new work. Maps PROMPT_build.md behavior to Copilot agent mode.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T22:02:12Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T22:02:12Z"}

new_value: Created .github/agents/beads-dev.agent.md encoding the full build loop: orient (AGENTS.md + bd ready), claim atomically, implement with study-first discipline, validate with backpressure, discover-and-link new work, commit on green, close with context, then stop. Maps PROMPT_build.md to VS Code Copilot agent mode with one-task-per-invocation enforced.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-x61","title":"Assess bd sync command: determine if it adds value and update call sites","description":"The specs/bd-sync-value-assessment.md spec asks whether 'bd sync' adds value in the loop. AGENTS.md Auto-Sync section claims writes auto-commit, but bd sync is still called explicitly in PROMPT_build.md Phase 5 and AGENTS.md Landing the Plane. Investigate what bd sync actually does (bd help sync), determine if it's redundant vs essential (hypothesis: it flushes Dolt state to git working tree before git push), then either document the rationale in AGENTS.md or remove it from all call sites.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:12:20Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T23:12:20Z"}

new_value: Investigated: bd sync is a non-existent command (returns 'unknown command'). Each bd write auto-commits to Dolt by default. Removed bd sync from AGENTS.md, PROMPT_build.md, PROMPT_plan.md, README.md, and all three slash command files. Added bd dolt commit as the correct alternative for batch mode.

Created .github/skills/beads-workflow/SKILL.md: complete claim-implement-close cycle with all 7 steps: find ready work, claim, implement, validate, discover+link, commit on green, close with context. Rules section enforces one-task discipline.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-mk4","title":"Add README documentation for VS Code Copilot agent setup","description":"Document how to use the VS Code Copilot agent integration: prerequisites (bd on PATH, VS Code 1.108.2, Copilot extension), available agents and skills, workflow examples, and how the ralph-beads loop maps to agent mode.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T22:02:25Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T22:02:25Z"}

Also updated project structure tree to show full .github/ layout.

All subtasks complete: copilot-instructions.md (bf2), vscode settings (8a1), beads-dev agent (ud3), beads-pm agent (1tp), beads-workflow skill (akk), beads-create skill (cux), beads-triage skill (3dw), beads-conventions instructions (0t4), README docs (mk4). old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-hom","title":"Audit .github/copilot-instructions.md for content parity with CLAUDE.md","description":"CLAUDE.md is the authoritative Claude Code project instructions. .github/copilot-instructions.md is the VS Code equivalent, but may be missing content. Audit both files side by side: identify what's in CLAUDE.md that's missing or outdated in copilot-instructions.md. Key areas: framework overview, user roles, how loop.sh maps to VS Code agent invocation model, slash command equivalents (prompt files), and rules. Update copilot-instructions.md with any gaps. Note: loop.sh-specific content should be translated to VS Code agent invocation patterns, not copied verbatim.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:28Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:28Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-0au","title":"Remove obsolete bd sync call from loop.sh","description":"loop.sh line 81 calls 'bd sync 2\u003e/dev/null || true' after each iteration, but AGENTS.md documents that bd sync does not exist as a command. The || true means it silently fails. This is dead code that should be removed to keep loop.sh clean and accurate. Verify bd sync is not a valid command (bd help sync or bd --help), then remove the call from loop.sh and close the bd-sync-value-assessment spec.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:11Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:11Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-4cc","title":"Create .github/prompts/ with VS Code Copilot prompt files for all slash commands","description":"Claude Code slash commands in .claude/commands/ (plan, build, status, add-spec, create-issue) have no VS Code Copilot equivalents. VS Code 1.108.2 supports .github/prompts/*.prompt.md as reusable prompt files. Create a prompt file for each command using VS Code prompt file conventions (YAML front matter with mode, description, tools). Content should be adapted from the .claude/commands/*.md files. This is required for the ralph-beads framework to work equivalently in VS Code.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:20Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:20Z"}

new_value: Removed bd sync call from loop.sh line 81. Confirmed 'bd sync' returns 'unknown command'. Dead code deleted, syntax validated.

Audited both files side-by-side. Added How It Works, User's Role, VS Code Agent Invocations (translating loop.sh to beads-pm/beads-dev invocations), expanded Project Structure to include .github/ files, and Rules section. loop.sh-specific content was translated to VS Code agent patterns rather than copied verbatim.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-ntb","title":"Create Claude Code to VS Code convention mapping document","description":"Document the explicit mapping between Claude Code files and their VS Code Copilot equivalents so contributors and agents understand the dual-IDE structure. Mapping should cover: CLAUDE.md → .github/copilot-instructions.md, .claude/commands/*.md → .github/prompts/*.prompt.md, PROMPT_plan.md/PROMPT_build.md → .github/agents/beads-pm.agent.md/.github/agents/beads-dev.agent.md, AGENTS.md → .github/instructions/beads-conventions.instructions.md. Place in docs/ or as a section in README.md. Depends on copilot-instructions.md audit being complete.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:36Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-05T23:56:36Z"}

new_value: Added File Convention Mapping table to README.md VS Code Copilot Agent Integration section. Table covers all 6 file pairs: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, PROMPT_plan.md, PROMPT_build.md, .claude/commands/*.md, and .claude/skills/. Added note that bd is the shared state layer across both IDEs.

Created .github/prompts/ with 5 prompt files: plan, build, status, add-spec, create-issue. Each has YAML front matter (mode: agent, description, tools). add-spec and create-issue use ${input:description} for user input. Content adapted from .claude/commands/*.md counterparts with VS Code conventions.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.1","title":"Create GitHub label set for beads metadata","description":"Create the GitHub label convention (type:bug, type:feature, type:task, priority:0-4, epic:*, spec-candidate, spec-created, blocked) in the repo using gh label create. {"id":"ralph-beads-kms","title":"GitHub Projects Integration","description":"Epic: Enable ralph-beads to sync bidirectionally with GitHub Projects. {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.8","title":"Add sync and triage modes to loop.sh","description":"Extend loop.sh to support ./loop.sh sync and ./loop.sh triage modes. Sync mode calls scripts/gh-sync.sh. {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.6","title":"Add close-comment narrative to build loop","description":"When bd close is called during a build iteration and the issue has an external-ref (GitHub issue number), automatically post a comment on the linked GitHub Issue summarizing: commit SHA, close reason, and what was implemented. The comment should be posted via gh issue comment.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:43Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:43Z"}

new_value: Created scripts/gh-triage.sh — inbound flow converting spec-candidate GitHub Issues into specs/ files. Parses issue body into standard template, preserves provenance, comments back, adds spec-created label. Idempotent with --dry-run support. Tested with issue #15. Commit 756d756.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.8","title":"Add sync and triage modes to loop.sh","description":"Extend loop.sh to support ./loop.sh sync and ./loop.sh triage modes. Sync mode calls scripts/gh-sync.sh. Triage mode calls scripts/gh-triage.sh. Both are single-shot (no loop iteration). Must not break existing plan/build modes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:48Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:35:56Z","external_ref":"gh-6"}

new_value: Extended loop.sh with sync and triage single-shot modes. Both delegate to respective scripts via exec, support --dry-run passthrough. Existing plan/build modes unchanged. Filed discovered issue ralph-beads-215 for CLAUDE.md docs update. Commit 3fa130d.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.4","title":"Map beads dependency relationships to GitHub Issue references","description":"When syncing beads issues to GitHub, include 'Blocked by #N' and 'Blocks #N' references in the issue body. Use GitHub sub-issues feature if available. Update references when dependency graph changes. Part of gh-sync.sh outbound flow.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:36Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:36:01Z","external_ref":"gh-9"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-215","title":"Discovered: Update CLAUDE.md key commands with sync/triage modes","description":"CLAUDE.md Key Commands section needs to document ./loop.sh sync and ./loop.sh triage modes added in ralph-beads-kms.8. Also update the README if it has similar documentation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T03:25:54Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T03:25:54Z"}

new_value: Added build_dependency_maps() to gh-sync.sh that cross-references beads dependency graph and generates 'Blocked by #N' / 'Blocks #N' references in GitHub Issue bodies. External_ref linkage resolves beads IDs to GH numbers. All existing issues updated with dependency sections. Commit a93ea92.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-9a6","title":"Add Landing the Plane section to copilot-instructions.md","description":"The .github/copilot-instructions.md is missing the 'Landing the Plane' session completion protocol from AGENTS.md (lines 133-157). VS Code agents need the same mandatory push workflow to avoid stranded work. Copy the essential rules: git push is mandatory, never stop before pushing, verify up-to-date.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:14Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:36:03Z","external_ref":"gh-10"}

new_value: Added Landing the Plane session completion protocol to .github/copilot-instructions.md. VS Code agents now have the same mandatory push workflow: file remaining work, quality gates, update status, git push (mandatory), verify, hand off. Commit f52bce4.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-kcc","title":"Create Claude Code to VS Code file mapping document","description":"Create a human-readable mapping document (e.g. docs/CLAUDE-VSCODE-MAPPING.md) explaining which Claude Code file maps to which VS Code file. Required by vscode-convention-parity spec. Mappings: .claude/commands/*.md \u003c-\u003e .github/prompts/*.prompt.md, PROMPT_plan.md \u003c-\u003e beads-pm agent, PROMPT_build.md \u003c-\u003e beads-dev agent, CLAUDE.md \u003c-\u003e .github/copilot-instructions.md, loop.sh plan \u003c-\u003e @beads-pm invocation, loop.sh build \u003c-\u003e @beads-dev invocation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:11Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:36:04Z","external_ref":"gh-11"}

new_value: Created docs/CLAUDE-VSCODE-MAPPING.md with comprehensive mapping tables covering project instructions, slash commands/prompts, build prompts/agents, loop invocations, VS Code-only skills, and key differences. Closes the vscode-convention-parity spec requirement. Commit 62e578b.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-215","title":"Discovered: Update CLAUDE.md key commands with sync/triage modes","description":"CLAUDE.md Key Commands section needs to document ./loop.sh sync and ./loop.sh triage modes added in ralph-beads-kms.8. Also update the README if it has similar documentation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T03:25:54Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:04:10Z","external_ref":"gh-16"}

new_value: Updated CLAUDE.md key commands with sync/triage modes and README.md After the Loop table. Commit bd4b162.

All references were already removed in commits 81b47d7 and 577505e. AGENTS.md correctly documents auto-commit behavior. Remove or archive the spec file.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"chore","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:07Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:36:09Z","external_ref":"gh-14"}

new_value: Removed untracked specs/bd-sync-value-assessment.md. The bd sync command does not exist (confirmed). All framework references were already removed in prior commits. AGENTS.md correctly notes 'No manual bd sync — that command does not exist'.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.7","title":"Build changelog generator from closed beads issues","description":"Create scripts/gh-changelog.sh that reads bd list --status closed --json, groups by epic/type/priority, formats as markdown with commit SHAs and PR links, and outputs to stdout or CHANGELOG.md. Support --since flag for date filtering. This is the narrative artifact generator.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:45Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:36:08Z","external_ref":"gh-13"}

new_value: Created scripts/gh-changelog.sh — reads closed beads issues, groups by epic/type, includes commit SHAs and GitHub issue links. Supports --since and --output flags. Added changelog mode to loop.sh. Commit 5dc207b.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-kms.9","title":"Add PR description auto-generation from beads issues","description":"Create a script or gh-sync.sh subcommand that generates PR descriptions from the set of beads issues addressed in the current branch. Reads git log to find 'Closes: \u003cbd-id\u003e' references, looks up those issues and their GitHub counterparts, and formats a PR body with summary, linked issues, and test plan sections.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T01:04:51Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T01:36:06Z","external_ref":"gh-12"}

new_value: Created scripts/gh-pr-body.sh — reads git log for Closes: references, looks up beads issues and GitHub counterparts, formats PR body with summary, linked issues table, commits, and test plan. Supports --base and --output flags. Commit 5eab753.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-4s8","title":"Fix shell injection in gh-triage.sh and other scripts","description":"The run() helper in gh-triage.sh uses subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) with string interpolation. Backticks in GitHub issue comment bodies get executed as shell commands, causing hangs (e.g. ./loop.sh plan gets spawned). Same pattern exists in gh-sync.sh, gh-changelog.sh, and gh-pr-body.sh. Fix: use subprocess.run with list args instead of shell=True.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T13:02:02Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T13:02:02Z"}

new_value: Fixed shell injection in all 4 scripts (gh-triage.sh, gh-sync.sh, gh-changelog.sh, gh-pr-body.sh). Changed run() helpers from subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) with f-string interpolation to subprocess.run(list_args) without shell=True. All callers updated to pass command args as lists. Verified with syntax checks and dry-runs.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-6og","title":"Add closing comments to GitHub Issues on bd close sync","description":"Spec: specs/github-projects-integration.md (Narrative Artifact Generation). When gh-sync.sh detects a beads issue has transitioned to closed, it should add a comment on the linked GitHub Issue with the commit SHA and close reason (e.g. 'Implemented in abc123. \u003cclose reason\u003e'). Currently it only closes the issue without commenting. Need to: 1) Read close_reason from beads issue JSON 2) Find latest commit SHA referencing the beads ID 3) gh issue comment with summary.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:54:28Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:54:28Z"}

new_value: Added get_commit_for_issue() helper and closing comment logic to update_gh_issue() in gh-sync.sh. When a beads issue transitions to closed, the sync now posts a comment with the commit SHA and close_reason on the linked GitHub Issue before closing it. Dry-run shows +closing-comment indicator.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-0f3","title":"Add Mermaid workflow diagram to documentation","description":"Spec: specs/ralph-beads-workflow-diagram.md (GitHub Issue #17). Create a Mermaid diagram showing the full Ralph-Beads + GitHub Integration workflow. Should cover: specs → plan loop → beads task graph → build loop → code + commits → GitHub sync → GitHub Issues/Projects board → triage back to specs. Add to README.md or docs/. Use Mermaid syntax for GitHub rendering compatibility.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:54:24Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:54:24Z"}

new_value: Added Mermaid flowchart diagram to README.md under 'How It Works > Workflow Diagram'. Shows the full cycle: specs → plan loop → beads DAG → build loop (with backpressure) → git commits → GitHub sync → GitHub Issues/Projects → triage back to specs. Includes user intervention via bd CLI. Uses GitHub-compatible Mermaid syntax with 5 subgraphs (User, PlanLoop, BuildLoop, BeadsDB, GitHub).

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-4ph","title":"Add epic labels to GitHub Issues during sync","description":"Spec: specs/github-projects-integration.md (Label Convention table). The spec defines epic:\u003cepic-title\u003e labels (e.g. epic:github-integration) but gh-sync.sh beads_to_labels() only generates type: and priority: labels plus 'blocked'. Add epic label generation: if a beads issue has a parent (epic), include 'epic:\u003cparent-title\u003e' in the label set. Also ensure gh-labels.sh can handle dynamic epic labels or document that they are created on-the-fly.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:54:31Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:54:31Z"}

new_value: Added epic label generation to gh-sync.sh. beads_to_labels() now accepts an epic_titles map and appends epic:<slugified-title> labels for issues with a parent. slugify_epic() converts titles to label-safe slugs. beads_label_prefixes updated to include 'epic:' for label management on updates. Epic titles map built from beads issues in main() and threaded through dep_args.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-bxd","title":"Add epic/subtask relationships as GitHub sub-issues or tasklists during sync","description":"Spec: specs/github-projects-integration.md (GitHub Projects Board section). The spec requires 'Epic/subtask relationships are visible via GitHub'\\''s sub-issue or tasklist features.' Currently gh-project.sh defines an epic label type but does not create actual sub-issue links or tasklist checkboxes on epic issues. Need to: 1) Detect beads parent-child relationships 2) Either use GitHub sub-issues API or add tasklist markdown (- [ ] #N) to epic issue bodies during sync 3) Update gh-sync.sh or gh-project.sh to handle this.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T04:57:52Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T04:57:52Z"}

new_value: Added subtask tasklist generation to format_gh_body() in gh-sync.sh. Epic issues now include a '### Subtasks' section with GitHub-compatible tasklist checkboxes (- [x] #N for closed, - [ ] title for open). Built children_map (epic_id → child issues) in main() and threaded through create/update functions. Uses GitHub issue refs when available, falls back to title + beads ID.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-29v","title":"Create reusable setup-beads composite action","description":"Create .github/actions/setup-beads/action.yml composite action that: (1) installs bd CLI via npm, (2) verifies .beads/ directory exists, (3) runs bd prime. This is the foundation all workflow files depend on. Must work on GitHub-hosted ubuntu runners.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:37Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:37Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-y6i","title":"Harden loop.sh argument parsing","description":"Fix the *[0-9]* pattern in loop.sh arg parsing (line 28) which matches any string containing a digit (e.g., 'v2-feature' would be parsed as max iterations). Replace with a pattern that only matches purely numeric strings. This is a simple, self-contained fix with no dependencies.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:12Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:12Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-hnh","title":"Extract shared script utilities into scripts/lib.py","description":"Extract duplicated functions from gh-sync.sh, gh-triage.sh, gh-changelog.sh, and gh-pr-body.sh into a shared scripts/lib.py module. Functions to extract: run() (subprocess runner), get_beads_issues() (beads loader), get_external_ref() (GH issue number extractor), get_repo_url(), slugify(), get_commit_for_issue(). Each script imports from lib.py. No new external dependencies -- stdlib only.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:31Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:31Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-lk6","title":"Add signal handling to loop.sh","description":"Trap SIGINT/SIGTERM in loop.sh for graceful shutdown. On signal: wait for current Claude process to exit (with a grace period), print iteration summary, then exit cleanly. Prevent orphaned Claude processes after Ctrl+C.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:20Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:20Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-xe1","title":"Add pre-flight checks to loop.sh","description":"Before entering the build/plan loop, verify: (1) clean git state (no uncommitted changes that could conflict), (2) warn if on main branch, (3) bd prime succeeds (beads DB accessible), (4) claude CLI is available. Fail fast with clear messages instead of failing mid-iteration.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:18Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:18Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-zty","title":"Add structured iteration logging","description":"Write iteration logs to project-local logs/ directory instead of /tmp/. Name format: logs/build-YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS-iter-N.log. After each iteration, append a JSON summary line to logs/summary.jsonl with: iteration, start_time, duration_s, exit_code, beads_issue_id, outcome. Add logs/ to .gitignore.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:26Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:26Z"}

new_value: Created .github/actions/setup-beads/action.yml composite action. Installs bd CLI via npm (with configurable version input), verifies .beads/ directory exists, and runs bd prime. Works on GitHub-hosted ubuntu runners. All downstream workflow issues (sync, triage, pr, labels, changelog) can now use this action.

old_value: {"id":"ralph-beads-7mf","title":"Create beads-sync GitHub Actions workflow","description":"Create .github/workflows/beads-sync.yml that triggers on push to main. Runs scripts/gh-sync.sh and scripts/gh-project.sh. Uses setup-beads composite action. Requires issues:write and project:write permissions. Guards against forks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:40Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:40Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-9hw","title":"Create beads-triage GitHub Actions workflow","description":"Create .github/workflows/beads-triage.yml that triggers on issues.labeled event when label is spec-candidate. Runs scripts/gh-triage.sh. Commits new spec file back to repo. Uses setup-beads composite action.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:41Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:41Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-uk0","title":"Create beads-labels GitHub Actions workflow","description":"Create .github/workflows/beads-labels.yml that triggers on workflow_dispatch. Runs scripts/gh-labels.sh to ensure all beads labels exist. Idempotent. Uses setup-beads composite action.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:46Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:46Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-0ca","title":"Create beads-pr GitHub Actions workflow","description":"Create .github/workflows/beads-pr.yml that triggers on pull_request.opened/synchronize. Runs scripts/gh-pr-body.sh and updates the PR description. Only runs on PRs with beads-managed labels or created by the framework. Uses setup-beads composite action.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:45Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:45Z"}

{"id":"ralph-beads-jhm","title":"Create beads-changelog GitHub Actions workflow","description":"Create .github/workflows/beads-changelog.yml that triggers on release.created or workflow_dispatch. Runs scripts/gh-changelog.sh --since \u003clast-release\u003e --output CHANGELOG.md. Attaches changelog as release asset. Uses setup-beads composite action.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"derstine.michael@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:43Z","created_by":"MD","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:00:43Z"}
